nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I currently am incapable of writing such code, and at the time it seems practical to use A.I. to collaborate with and help write the code

nodes.label: AI's ability to find specific API and ticker information
nodes.label_negative: AI's inability to access restricted channels for information
nodes.grounding_span: AI up until this moment has not been able to find this type of information for me

nodes.label: Human oversight of AI-generated code
nodes.label_negative: Blind trust in AI-generated code without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I double check that performing a specific function within the code is safe. I want that to stay in my hands so I don't lose my money

nodes.label: AI as explanation aid for known concepts
nodes.label_negative: Difficulty articulating ideas to AI due to limited coding knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: It can be frustrating when I have a specific idea in my head that is sometimes a bit to hard to articulate to the AI

nodes.label: AI as project persistence enabler
nodes.label_negative: Dependence on AI for every step
nodes.grounding_span: I'd say more independence for sure as AI can start doing some of the heavy lifting for me

nodes.label: Financial safety and risk mitigation
nodes.grounding_span: so I don't lose my money

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it cuts a significant portion of time off for me

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: at least have some grasp of why the code is written

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code generation
nodes.grounding_span: AI has surpassed my expectations on these types of tasks

nodes.label: Frustration with communication gap when articulating ideas
nodes.grounding_span: It can be frustrating when I have a specific idea in my head that is sometimes a bit to hard to articulate to the AI

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'd say more independence for sure as AI can start doing some of the heavy lifting for me

nodes.label: Structured iterative refinement — breaks brainstorming into stages
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorming typically will have a lot of back and forth until I finally tweak it enough to produce the output I'm looking for

nodes.label: Safety-tiered verification approach
